name: faaah-extension
displayName: Faaah - Trend Sound Effects for Errors
description: Plays a sound effect when errors appear in the Problems panel or a terminal exits with a non-zero code.

faaah.enabled.description: Enable or disable error sound effects.

faaah.soundFile.description: Absolute path to a custom sound file (.wav, .aiff, .mp3, .oga). Leave empty to use the default system error sound.

faaah.debounceMs.description: Milliseconds to wait after an error event before playing the sound (debounce). Prevents rapid repeated playback.
